create-daily-task.description: Demo of the bare beam-schedule executor mechanics (registering a cron task via the host executor + reconciler). Production workflows should gate this with humanGate.stage='before' so an operator approves the cadence + prompt + target chat before the task is persisted; see canary-multistep.workflow.json for the draft→confirm→side-effect pattern. `unsafeAllowUngated` is the explicit opt-out — never an oversight.
